prophecies.q: 你来这里的任务是什么？
prophecies.a: 我被派回1975年，去取回一台IBM 5100便携式计算机。它有一个未公开的功能，能够在IBM大型机编程语言之间进行翻译转换，这在我们的时代非常需要。
prophecies.q_en: What is your mission here?
prophecies.a_en: I was sent back to 1975 to retrieve an IBM 5100 portable computer. It has an undocumented feature that allows it to translate between IBM mainframe programming languages, which is desperately needed in our time.
prophecies.verdict_zh: IBM 5100确实拥有一个未公开记录的功能：能够在APL和BASIC之间进行仿真翻译，还能直接访问System/370大型机代码。这个功能在提托发帖时并非公众所知，直到后来IBM工程师Bob Dubke证实了这一点。提托准确描述了一台古旧计算机的隐藏特性，这是其最有力的验证之一。
prophecies.verdict_en: The IBM 5100 indeed had an undocumented feature: the ability to emulate and translate between APL and BASIC, and directly access System/370 mainframe code. This capability was not publicly known when Titor posted. IBM engineer Bob Dubke later confirmed this. Titor's accurate description of an obscure computer's hidden features is considered one of his strongest verified claims.

prophecies.q: 美国未来会发生什么大事？
prophecies.a: 美国将会发生内战。社会将围绕城市与乡村、联邦权力与个人自由的矛盾而分裂。内战将在2004年左右以越来越频繁的社会动荡和冲突形式开始，到2008年达到全面战争状态。
prophecies.q_en: What major events will happen in the US?
prophecies.a_en: The US will have a civil war. Society will split along the lines of city vs. rural, federal power vs. individual liberty. The civil war will begin around 2004 with increasing unrest and conflict, escalating to full-scale war by 2008.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2004年至2008年间美国并未爆发内战。虽然美国社会在此期间确实存在政治极化现象（如反伊战运动、2008年金融危机引发的社会不满），但远未达到内战程度。提托关于城乡对立、联邦权力争议的描述在后来的美国政治（2016年后）中有所体现，但时间线完全不符。
prophecies.verdict_en: No civil war occurred in the US between 2004 and 2008. While political polarization did exist during this period (anti-Iraq War movement, social unrest from the 2008 financial crisis), it was nowhere near civil war levels. Titor's descriptions of urban-rural division and federal power disputes did resonate with later US politics (post-2016), but the timeline was entirely wrong.

prophecies.q: 第三次世界大战会发生吗？
prophecies.a: 是的。核战争将发生在2015年。俄罗斯将向美国、中国和欧洲的主要城市发射核武器。美国本土将被击中，主要城市被摧毁。战争虽然短暂但极具破坏性，死亡人数约30亿。
prophecies.q_en: Will World War Three happen?
prophecies.a_en: Yes. A nuclear war will occur in 2015. Russia will launch nuclear strikes against the US, China, and Europe's major cities. The US mainland will be hit and major cities destroyed. The war is brief but devastating, with approximately 3 billion dead.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2015年并未爆发核战争或第三次世界大战。虽然2014年克里米亚危机后俄罗斯与西方关系急剧恶化，但远未升级至核冲突。提托预言的30亿人死亡的核战争完全未发生。
prophecies.verdict_en: No nuclear war or World War Three occurred in 2015. While Russia-West relations deteriorated sharply after the 2014 Crimea crisis, this was far from nuclear conflict. Titor's predicted nuclear war killing 3 billion people did not materialize.

prophecies.q: CERN有什么重大发现？
prophecies.a: CERN将会发现制造微型黑洞的方法。这项发现对时间旅行理论的实际应用至关重要，它最终使我们的时间机器成为可能。
prophecies.q_en: Does CERN make any major discoveries?
prophecies.a_en: CERN will discover how to create micro black holes. This discovery is crucial for the practical application of time travel theory and ultimately makes our time machines possible.
prophecies.verdict_zh: CERN没有制造出微型黑洞，但2008年大型强子对撞机（LHC）启动后，微型黑洞的可能性确实成为了科学界和公众热议的话题。2012年CERN发现了希格斯玻色子，是基本粒子物理学的重大突破。提托关于CERN的核心地位判断正确，但具体成果不符。
prophecies.verdict_en: CERN did not create micro black holes, but the possibility of micro black holes became a major topic of scientific and public discussion after the Large Hadron Collider (LHC) launched in 2008. CERN discovered the Higgs boson in 2012, a major breakthrough in particle physics. Titor was correct about CERN's central importance, but the specific achievement was wrong.

prophecies.q: 2004年的总统选举会怎样？
prophecies.a: 2004年之后不会再有奥运会了。社会的不安定使得这种大型国际赛事无法继续举办。
prophecies.q_en: What about the 2004 presidential election?
prophecies.a_en: There will be no more Olympic Games after 2004. Social instability makes it impossible to continue holding such large international events.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2004年后奥运会照常举办：2006年都灵冬奥会、2008年北京夏季奥运会、2010年温哥华冬奥会等一直持续至今。即使2020年东京奥运会因新冠疫情推迟一年，也并未取消。此预言完全错误。
prophecies.verdict_en: Olympic Games continued normally after 2004: the 2006 Turin Winter Olympics, 2008 Beijing Summer Olympics, 2010 Vancouver Winter Olympics, and so on up to the present day. Even the 2020 Tokyo Olympics were only postponed by one year due to COVID-19, not canceled. This prediction was entirely wrong.

prophecies.q: 疯牛病会成为严重问题吗？
prophecies.a: 是的，疯牛病将成为一个越来越大的问题。传染性海绵状脑病（朊病毒病）会继续蔓延，感染规模远超目前的预期。人们最终会发现，朊病毒已经通过食物链广泛传播。
prophecies.q_en: Will mad cow disease become a serious problem?
prophecies.a_en: Yes, mad cow disease will become an increasingly major problem. CJD (prion disease) will continue to spread, infecting far more people than currently expected. People will eventually discover that prions have spread widely through the food chain.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 疯牛病（BSE）在2003年确实成为全球关注焦点：美国在2003年12月发现首例本土病例，导致多国禁止进口美国牛肉。然而疫情并未如提托所言大规模蔓延，通过严格的食品安全管控，疯牛病后来逐步得到控制，人类变异型克雅氏病（vCJD）病例总数约230例，未出现大规模流行。
prophecies.verdict_en: BSE (mad cow disease) did become a global concern in 2003: the US discovered its first domestic case in December 2003, leading many countries to ban US beef imports. However, it did not spread on the massive scale Titor predicted. Through strict food safety controls, BSE was gradually contained, with approximately 230 total cases of variant CJD worldwide — far from a pandemic.

prophecies.q: 你的时间机器是什么样的？
prophecies.a: 我使用的是通用电气C204型重力畸变时间位移装置。它安装在一辆1967年雪佛兰科尔维特上。装置利用两个微型奇点产生标准的偏转重力场，实现时间位移。它的重量约225公斤，需要一个稳定的电源。
prophecies.q_en: What does your time machine look like?
prophecies.a_en: I use a General Electric C204 gravity distortion time displacement unit. It's mounted in a 1967 Chevrolet Corvette. The unit uses two micro singularities to generate a standard offset Tipler sinusoid, enabling time displacement. It weighs about 500 pounds and requires a stable power source.

prophecies.q: 时间旅行的基本原理是什么？
prophecies.a: 时间旅行基于埃弗雷特-惠勒多世界诠释。每次你做出一个决定，宇宙就分裂出新的时间线。所以我来到的这个2000年可能与我经历过的那个2000年有2%左右的偏差。我无法精确预测你们的未来，因为这不一定是我的过去。
prophecies.q_en: What is the basic principle of time travel?
prophecies.a_en: Time travel is based on the Everett-Wheeler many-worlds interpretation. Every time you make a decision, the universe splits into new worldlines. So the year 2000 I arrived in may have about a 2% divergence from the 2000 I experienced. I cannot precisely predict your future because it may not be my past.

prophecies.q: 在你的时间线上，谁是2005年的总统？
prophecies.a: 2005年的总统与2000年的总统不是同一个人。我不想说出名字，因为那可能会改变事件的走向。但我可以说，在内战导致的社会崩溃中，总统的角色变得越来越不重要。
prophecies.q_en: Who is the president in 2005 on your worldline?
prophecies.a_en: The president in 2005 is not the same person as in 2000. I don't want to name names because that could change the course of events. But I can say that as the civil war causes social breakdown, the role of the president becomes increasingly irrelevant.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2004年大选乔治·W·布什连任，2005年总统确实与2000年相同（小布什于2001年就任）。但提托暗示2004年之后将有不同的总统，这并不准确。不过他关于「不想改变事件走向」的说法为自己留了退路。
prophecies.verdict_en: George W. Bush was re-elected in 2004, so the 2005 president was the same as in 2000 (Bush took office in 2001). Titor's implication of a different president was incorrect. However, his caveat about 'not wanting to change the course of events' gave him plausible deniability.

prophecies.q: 内战后的美国社会是什么样的？
prophecies.a: 核战争后，美国社会回归到以社区为基础的小型聚落形态。人们更加重视家庭、自给自足和本地治理。大型城市不再存在。人们种植自己的食物，相互帮助。科技仍然存在，但更加简单和实用。
prophecies.q_en: What is American society like after the civil war?
prophecies.a_en: After the nuclear war, American society returns to small community-based settlements. People place more value on family, self-sufficiency, and local governance. Large cities no longer exist. People grow their own food and help each other. Technology still exists but is simpler and more practical.

prophecies.q: 未来的互联网是什么样的？
prophecies.a: 互联网仍然存在，但与你们所知的非常不同。它更加去中心化，没有大公司控制。安全性和隐私受到更多重视。内容更多是信息性的而非娱乐性的。
prophecies.q_en: What is the internet like in the future?
prophecies.a_en: The internet still exists but is very different from what you know. It's more decentralized, with no big corporations in control. Security and privacy are more emphasized. Content is more informational than entertainment-oriented.

prophecies.q: 美国宪法在未来还存在吗？
prophecies.a: 美国宪法仍然是政府的基础，但其解释方式回归到了更接近原始意图的状态。第二修正案（持枪权）被视为最重要的修正案之一。联邦政府的权力大大缩减。
prophecies.q_en: Does the US Constitution still exist in the future?
prophecies.a_en: The US Constitution is still the basis of government, but its interpretation has returned to something closer to the original intent. The Second Amendment (right to bear arms) is considered one of the most important amendments. Federal government power is greatly reduced.

prophecies.q: 在你的时代，宗教的情况如何？
prophecies.a: 宗教是日常生活中非常重要的一部分。人们更加注重个人与上帝的直接关系，而非组织化的教会。经历了战争和苦难之后，人们普遍变得更加虔诚。不同宗教之间的关系总体上比现在更加和谐。
prophecies.q_en: What is religion like in your time?
prophecies.a_en: Religion is a very important part of daily life. People focus more on personal relationship with God rather than organized churches. After experiencing war and suffering, people generally become more devout. Relations between different religions are generally more harmonious than now.

prophecies.q: 核战争后的世界秩序是怎样的？
prophecies.a: 中国成为了一个超级大国。西方国家的实力大幅削弱。俄罗斯虽然发动了核攻击，但自身也遭受重创。国际秩序更加多极化，没有任何一个国家能够称霸全球。
prophecies.q_en: What is the world order like after the nuclear war?
prophecies.a_en: China becomes a superpower. Western nations are greatly weakened. Russia, though it launched the nuclear attacks, also suffered heavy damage. The international order is more multipolar, with no single nation able to dominate globally.

prophecies.q: 水资源在未来是否成为问题？
prophecies.a: 是的，清洁水资源成为了一个重大问题。核污染使许多水源无法使用。水净化技术是我们时代最重要的技术之一。每个社区都必须有自己的净水系统。
prophecies.q_en: Does water become a problem in the future?
prophecies.a_en: Yes, clean water becomes a major issue. Nuclear contamination makes many water sources unusable. Water purification technology is one of the most important technologies of our time. Every community must have its own water purification system.

prophecies.q: 美国内战的根源是什么？
prophecies.a: 内战的根源在于美国社会日益加深的分裂：城市与乡村的对立、联邦权力的过度扩张、个人自由受到侵蚀。当政府开始限制公民的权利——特别是第二修正案权利时，矛盾激化到了不可调和的地步。
prophecies.q_en: What are the root causes of the US civil war?
prophecies.a_en: The root causes are the deepening divisions in American society: urban vs. rural conflict, federal overreach, and erosion of individual liberties. When the government begins to restrict citizens' rights — especially Second Amendment rights — tensions escalate to an irreconcilable point.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 虽然2004年并未爆发内战，但提托描述的社会分裂趋势在后来的美国政治中有所体现：城乡对立在2016年和2020年大选中成为显著特征，枪支管控争议持续激化，联邦权力与州权之间的张力不断升级（如2020-2021年的抗议活动、2021年1月6日国会事件）。趋势判断有一定预见性，但内战程度的预测完全错误。
prophecies.verdict_en: While no civil war erupted in 2004, Titor's described social divisions did manifest in later American politics: urban-rural polarization became prominent in the 2016 and 2020 elections, gun control debates intensified, and federal-state tensions escalated (the 2020-2021 protests, January 6, 2021 Capitol incident). The trend analysis showed some foresight, but the prediction of actual civil war was entirely wrong.

prophecies.q: 中东地区的未来如何？
prophecies.a: 中东地区的冲突将持续并加剧。以色列将继续存在但面临更大的威胁。西方国家对中东地区的干预将带来灾难性的后果。
prophecies.q_en: What about the future of the Middle East?
prophecies.a_en: Conflict in the Middle East will continue and intensify. Israel will continue to exist but face greater threats. Western intervention in the Middle East will have catastrophic consequences.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 中东冲突确实持续并加剧：2003年伊拉克战争、叙利亚内战（2011年起）、ISIS崛起（2014年）、也门战争等。西方干预确实带来了灾难性后果（伊拉克战争后的权力真空）。以色列持续面临威胁。但这些预测属于较容易做出的趋势判断，缺乏具体细节。
prophecies.verdict_en: Middle East conflicts did continue and intensify: 2003 Iraq War, Syrian Civil War (from 2011), ISIS rise (2014), Yemen War, etc. Western intervention did have catastrophic consequences (power vacuum after Iraq War). Israel continued facing threats. However, these are fairly easy trend predictions lacking specific details.

prophecies.q: 全球变暖在未来是个问题吗？
prophecies.a: 在核战争之后，全球变暖不再是人们关注的主要问题。核冬天的影响和生存需求使环境问题退居次要地位。不过在战前，气候变化确实导致了一些极端天气事件。
prophecies.q_en: Is global warming a problem in the future?
prophecies.a_en: After the nuclear war, global warming is no longer a primary concern. The effects of nuclear winter and survival needs push environmental issues to the background. However, before the war, climate change did cause some extreme weather events.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 全球变暖在2015年后成为更大的问题而非消退：2015年巴黎气候协定签署、极端天气事件频率和强度持续增加、全球平均温度不断刷新纪录。提托预言的前提（核战争）未发生，因此整个叙事链断裂。
prophecies.verdict_en: Global warming became a bigger, not smaller, issue after 2015: the Paris Climate Agreement was signed in 2015, extreme weather events continued to increase in frequency and intensity, and global average temperatures kept breaking records. Titor's premise (nuclear war) did not occur, so the entire narrative chain broke down.

prophecies.q: 在你的时代，有什么重大的科技发展？
prophecies.a: 科技更加注重实用性而非娱乐性。3D打印技术非常重要，每个社区都有自己的制造能力。能源来源更加本地化和分散化。最大的科技突破是时间旅行本身。
prophecies.q_en: What major technological developments exist in your time?
prophecies.a_en: Technology focuses more on practicality than entertainment. 3D printing is very important — every community has its own manufacturing capability. Energy sources are more localized and distributed. The biggest technological breakthrough is time travel itself.

prophecies.q: 人们还看电视吗？
prophecies.a: 电视节目和大众媒体已经基本消失。没有大型广播网络或有线电视。信息主要通过本地的社区网络传播。好莱坞和娱乐产业在战后不复存在。
prophecies.q_en: Do people still watch TV?
prophecies.a_en: Television programming and mass media have mostly disappeared. There are no major broadcast networks or cable TV. Information primarily spreads through local community networks. Hollywood and the entertainment industry no longer exist after the war.

prophecies.q: 未来还使用美元吗？
prophecies.a: 美元仍然存在但价值大幅下降。物物交换和本地货币在日常生活中更加常见。贵金属（金银）被广泛用作价值储存手段。大型银行系统已经崩溃。
prophecies.q_en: Is the US dollar still used in the future?
prophecies.a_en: The dollar still exists but has lost significant value. Bartering and local currencies are more common in daily life. Precious metals (gold and silver) are widely used as stores of value. The large banking system has collapsed.

prophecies.q: 大学还存在吗？
prophecies.a: 教育体系发生了根本性变化。没有大型大学了。教育更加本地化和实用化，由社区内有经验的人进行传授。人们更看重实际技能而非学位证书。
prophecies.q_en: Do universities still exist?
prophecies.a_en: The education system has fundamentally changed. There are no large universities anymore. Education is more localized and practical, taught by experienced community members. People value practical skills over degree certificates.

prophecies.q: 是否有时间旅行的证据可以展示？
prophecies.a: 我已经发布了时间机器的照片和操作手册图片。我的装置产生的重力场畸变可以通过激光笔在设备附近的偏折来验证。
prophecies.q_en: Can you show any evidence of time travel?
prophecies.a_en: I have posted photos of the time machine and operation manual images. The gravity field distortion produced by my device can be verified by the deflection of a laser pointer near the equipment.

prophecies.q: 食品安全在未来是个问题吗？
prophecies.a: 是的，食品安全是一个重大问题。朊病毒（疯牛病）通过食物链的传播比你们目前意识到的要严重得多。在核战争之后，食品安全更加困难，人们不得不依赖自己种植的食物。
prophecies.q_en: Is food safety a problem in the future?
prophecies.a_en: Yes, food safety is a major issue. Prion (mad cow disease) transmission through the food chain is much more serious than you currently realize. After the nuclear war, food safety becomes even more difficult, and people must rely on food they grow themselves.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 食品安全确实一直是全球关注的问题，但朊病毒并未如提托所说大规模通过食物链传播。全球变异型克雅氏病病例总计约230例，远未达到严重流行病的程度。现代食品安全监管体系有效控制了BSE风险。
prophecies.verdict_en: Food safety has indeed been a global concern, but prion transmission through the food chain did not become the massive problem Titor predicted. Total global cases of variant CJD numbered approximately 230, far from a serious epidemic. Modern food safety regulation effectively controlled BSE risk.

prophecies.q: 中国在核战争中扮演什么角色？
prophecies.a: 中国在战后成为占主导地位的世界大国。它将台湾、日本和韩国纳入了自己的势力范围。中国的军事扩张始于核战争期间，当西方国家忙于自我毁灭时。
prophecies.q_en: What role does China play in the nuclear war?
prophecies.a_en: China becomes the dominant world power after the war. It brings Taiwan, Japan, and Korea into its sphere of influence. China's military expansion begins during the nuclear war, while Western nations are busy destroying themselves.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 核战争未发生，中国并未通过军事手段将台湾、日本、韩国纳入势力范围。但中国确实在经济和军事上持续崛起，台海局势紧张加剧，中日、中韩关系也出现波动。提托对中国崛起的大方向判断有一定准确性，但具体情景（核战后扩张）完全错误。
prophecies.verdict_en: No nuclear war occurred, and China did not militarily absorb Taiwan, Japan, or Korea. However, China has indeed continued to rise economically and militarily, with increasing Taiwan Strait tensions and fluctuating China-Japan and China-Korea relations. Titor's general direction on China's rise had some accuracy, but the specific scenario (post-nuclear expansion) was entirely wrong.

prophecies.q: 未来的美国政治体制如何？
prophecies.a: 内战后美国分裂为五个较小的区域。联邦政府仍然存在但权力大大缩减，更像是一个松散的联盟。每个区域有自己的特色和治理方式。首都从华盛顿迁至奥马哈。
prophecies.q_en: What is the US political system like in the future?
prophecies.a_en: After the civil war, the US splits into five smaller regions. The federal government still exists but with greatly reduced power, more like a loose confederation. Each region has its own character and governance. The capital moves from Washington to Omaha.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2026年，美国并未分裂为五个区域，首都仍在华盛顿。虽然州权运动和分裂主义言论偶有出现（如德克萨斯独立运动），但美国联邦体制保持完整。此预言完全未应验。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of 2026, the US has not split into five regions, and the capital remains in Washington. While states' rights movements and secessionist rhetoric occasionally surface (e.g., Texas independence movements), the US federal system remains intact. This prediction was entirely unfulfilled.

prophecies.q: 人工智能在未来发展到什么程度？
prophecies.a: 人工智能并没有发展到你们所想象的那种程度。在战后的世界里，计算机仍然存在但功能更加基础和实用。没有什么超级智能或机器人取代人类的事情发生。
prophecies.q_en: How advanced is artificial intelligence in the future?
prophecies.a_en: Artificial intelligence has not developed to the extent you might imagine. In the post-war world, computers still exist but are more basic and practical. There's no super-intelligence or robots replacing humans.

prophecies.q: 你为什么在我们这个时代停留？
prophecies.a: 我在1975年完成了IBM 5100的取回任务后，选择在2000年短暂停留。一部分原因是个人性质的——我想见见我还是婴儿时期的自己和家人。另一个原因是我想体验一下这个时代的生活，看看人们在大灾难来临之前是怎么生活的。
prophecies.q_en: Why did you stop in our time?
prophecies.a_en: After completing my IBM 5100 retrieval mission in 1975, I chose to stop briefly in 2000. Part of the reason is personal — I wanted to see myself as a baby and my family. Another reason is that I wanted to experience life in this era, to see how people live before the great catastrophe.

prophecies.q: 如何验证你的时间机器照片是真实的？
prophecies.a: 我发布的照片显示了C204装置安装在汽车后座上的样子。装置有一个可见的奇点壳体和激光制导系统。你们可以检查照片中的重力透镜效应——在装置周围应该能看到轻微的光线弯曲。
prophecies.q_en: How can we verify your time machine photos are real?
prophecies.a_en: The photos I posted show the C204 unit installed in the backseat of the car. The device has a visible singularity housing and laser guidance system. You can check for gravitational lensing effects in the photos — you should see slight light bending around the device.

prophecies.q: Waco事件在未来是如何被看待的？
prophecies.a: 韦科事件和类似的联邦政府对公民使用武力的事件，在我的时间线上被视为内战的前兆和催化剂。这些事件象征着政府权力的滥用，最终激发了乡村地区的抵抗运动。
prophecies.q_en: How is the Waco incident viewed in the future?
prophecies.a_en: The Waco siege and similar events where the federal government used force against citizens are seen in my worldline as precursors and catalysts for the civil war. These events symbolize government overreach that ultimately triggered rural resistance movements.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 韦科事件（1993年）确实在美国右翼和民兵运动中产生了深远影响，直接促成了1995年俄克拉荷马城爆炸案。政府对公民武力使用的争议持续发酵。虽然未导致内战，但提托将韦科事件定位为政府与民间对抗的标志性事件，这一判断在美国政治话语中确实有所体现。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Waco siege (1993) did have a profound impact on American right-wing and militia movements, directly contributing to the 1995 Oklahoma City bombing. Debates about government use of force against citizens continued. While it didn't lead to civil war, Titor's framing of Waco as a symbolic event of government-civilian confrontation did resonate in American political discourse.

prophecies.q: 你们那个年代有智能手机吗？
prophecies.a: 通讯设备比你们现在用的更加简单和坚固。没有什么花哨的触摸屏设备。通讯更多依赖本地无线网络而非全球性的移动网络。
prophecies.q_en: Do you have smartphones in your time?
prophecies.a_en: Communication devices are simpler and more rugged than what you use now. No fancy touchscreen devices. Communication relies more on local wireless networks rather than global cellular networks.

prophecies.q: 你对我们这个时代有什么建议？
prophecies.a: 学习基本生存技能：种植食物、净化水源、急救知识。不要把所有东西都依赖大型系统——电力、食物供应、金融系统。与你的邻居建立联系，因为在危机到来时，你的社区就是你的生命线。
prophecies.q_en: What advice do you have for people of our time?
prophecies.a_en: Learn basic survival skills: growing food, purifying water, first aid. Don't depend on large systems for everything — electricity, food supply, financial systems. Build connections with your neighbors, because when crisis comes, your community is your lifeline.

prophecies.q: 联合国在未来还存在吗？
prophecies.a: 联合国已经不存在了。核战争后，没有任何全球性的政治组织能够维持运作。国际关系更多是基于双边或区域性的协议。
prophecies.q_en: Does the United Nations still exist in the future?
prophecies.a_en: The United Nations no longer exists. After the nuclear war, no global political organization can sustain operations. International relations are based more on bilateral or regional agreements.

prophecies.q: 在你的时间线上，太空探索进展如何？
prophecies.a: 太空探索在核战争后大幅缩减。没有大型太空项目。人们更关注地球上的生存问题而非太空探索。不过基本的卫星系统仍在运作。
prophecies.q_en: How has space exploration progressed on your worldline?
prophecies.a_en: Space exploration was greatly scaled back after the nuclear war. There are no major space programs. People are more focused on survival on Earth than space exploration. However, basic satellite systems still function.

prophecies.q: 你为什么要告诉我们这些？你不怕改变历史吗？
prophecies.a: 我说过，多世界理论意味着你们的时间线和我的时间线可能存在偏差。我告诉你们这些不会改变我的历史，但可能会让你们的未来有一些不同。如果你们能够从中汲取一些教训，避免一些苦难，那我觉得这是值得的。
prophecies.q_en: Why are you telling us all this? Aren't you afraid of changing history?
prophecies.a_en: As I've said, the many-worlds theory means your worldline and mine may diverge. Telling you this won't change my history, but it may make your future somewhat different. If you can learn some lessons from this and avoid some suffering, I think it's worth it.
